title: cyclosorus mutabilis
intro: Cyclosorus mutabilis, also known as the variable fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. It is native to Southeast Asia and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its ability to lower blood pressure and improve circulation. The plant is rich in antioxidants, which may help to reduce inflammation and improve overall health, and its extracts have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and anti-cancer properties. Cyclosorus mutabilis can be prepared as a decoction or a tincture, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional medicine to enhance its therapeutic effects.
